_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: MS-444 treatment of nude mice...also reduced the conversion of these micrometastases into the macroscopic neoplastic growth, and smaller metastatic areas were measured in MS-444–treated mice
details: MS-444 treatment reduced conversion of micrometastases into macroscopic neoplastic growth with smaller metastatic areas measured
